assessments.name: Image Src Binding
assessments.description: Use NgOptimizedImage with ngSrc for img tags; do not use src or [attr.src] for static or bound image sources.

outputFiles.code:

{{ product?.name \}}

attemptDetails.reasoning: The rule is about replacing [attr.src] with [ngSrc] on tags, and adding NgOptimizedImage to imports. ## Reviewing image tag rules - The rule requires replacing [attr.src] with [ngSrc] for tags. - It also involves adding NgOptimizedImage to the imports for proper image optimization. ## Checking violation details - A violation occurs in src/app/app.html at line 5. - The violation involves a single line, likely related to incorrect image tag usage. ## Evaluating nullish handling - Product?.image suggests product or image could be null, potentially causing errors with [ngSrc]. - Wrapping the tag with @if (product) ensures nullish values are handled, preventing build errors. ## Planning minimal changes - Replace [attr. [REDACTED]
